name: luxecart-platform
description: Full-stack e-commerce platform with admin panel and storefront

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,store,admin -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev -w packages/api" "npm run dev -w apps/storefront" "npm run dev -w apps/admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/storefront && npm run build -w apps/admin
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/storefront && npm run lint -w apps/admin
